stories.title: Integrate three-layer references into bootstrap docs
stories.description: Wire the new taxonomy/file contract/schema templates into llm-wiki-bootstrap references and related reusable docs so the design is actually discoverable by users of the scaffold.
acceptanceCriteria: Relevant bootstrap docs or references point to the new three-layer taxonomy/file-contract materials
No contradiction remains between bootstrap docs and the new three-layer architecture package

stories.title: Add SQLite operational runtime contract stubs
stories.description: Add concrete command/stub surfaces for SQLite operational index work so v1 is more than prose.
acceptanceCriteria: SQLite operational command contract is represented in repo-local files

stories.title: Add DuckDB analytical runtime contract stubs
stories.description: Add concrete command/stub surfaces for DuckDB analytical refresh and health operations so v2 has an executable shape.
acceptanceCriteria: DuckDB analytical command contract is represented in repo-local files

stories.title: Add drift and validation integration
stories.description: Extend the architecture package with validation-oriented integration surfaces so file/SQLite/DuckDB drift can be checked coherently.
acceptanceCriteria: Validation and drift paths are discoverable in repo-local artifacts
No source of truth ambiguity is introduced

stories.title: Sync operator-facing docs
stories.description: Update the operator-facing entry docs so the three-layer path is visible and consistent from the public face.
acceptanceCriteria: Operator-facing docs reflect the three-layer path
Docs remain consistent with templates and contracts

stories.title: Address code review findings for runtime stubs
stories.description: Fix page_type inference and DuckDB row-to-schema mapping so the runtime stubs are not obviously broken on first use.
acceptanceCriteria: SQLite page_type inference no longer corrupts common section names
DuckDB refresh maps JSONL rows into schema-compatible columns
